conditional: Compensation is close to being finalised and contract signing is expected this week.
headline: Maresca set for Man City move, Chelsea to get over £10m
body: Enzo Maresca is expected to sign his Manchester City contract this week, with Chelsea set to receive over £10m in compensation for his move.
text:
Enzo Maresca set to sign his Manchester City contract this week.

Compensation now agreed and is significantly in excess or £10m.💷


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Compensation to Chelsea for Enzo Maresca’s move to Manchester City is now close to being finalised.

Maresca is already part of all summer planning.👕





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2068801815320395963#m
